Learning analytics summaries across two languages

Abstract

The English abstract introduces the learning analytics dataset, the student cohort, and the interpretation goals for this Taylor and Francis fixture.

Resumen

El resumen en espanol permanece en la misma zona de abstract. Debe conservarse como una segunda variante del resumen y no como texto del cuerpo.

Methods

The methods section describes the institutional dataset, the preprocessing choices, and the evaluation pipeline in enough detail to stay classified as real body content.

A second methods paragraph confirms that only the abstract area has special multilingual handling. The rest of the article remains a normal single section.
